name: Burger King

current_snapshot.term_headline: 20 years freestanding; shorter for non-traditional or limited property control
current_snapshot.renewal_headline: Option (not right). Requires compliance, BKC approval, then-current FA, general release, successor fee, building upgrades. No successor for Big-Box/Delivery.

initial_fees_by_format.refundability: All nonrefundable except limited TRA/MTRA deposit refund and Carrols 30-day refund

recurring_fees_raw.combined_mandatory_minimum: 9.0% of Gross Sales (royalty + advertising) before rent, digital, local marketing, other
recurring_fees_raw.remodel_penalty_surcharge: +3.0% royalty on all Gross Sales for missed RTF2/RTF1/Forbearance deadlines

raw.carrols_acquisition_note: On May 16, 2024, RBI acquired Carrols Restaurant Group (1,023 restaurants). This single transaction accounts for nearly all 2024 reacquisitions and makes year-over-year comparisons misleading without context.
raw.franchisee_gag_clause: Some current and former franchisees signed provisions restricting their ability to speak openly about their experience in the last three fiscal years.

contract_burden.transfer: BKC consent. Buyer approved, training, fees ($2K+$500/add'l), general release, current image. ROFR on same terms.

raw.exclusive_territory: No. Explicitly: 'You will not receive an exclusive territory.'
raw.franchise_agreement_territory: Single location only. No protected area.
raw.alternative_channels: BKC reserves all rights — grocery, convenience, internet, direct marketing. No franchisee compensation.
raw.affiliate_competition: TH, Popeyes, FHS may operate in same markets. BKC not responsible for resolving inter-brand conflicts.

state_overrides.most_protective_state: North Dakota — effectively voids noncompete, forum, governing law, jury waiver, liquidated damages, general release, one-sided fee recovery
state_overrides.mn_termination_override: 90 days' notice (60 to cure) for termination; 180 days for non-renewal — supersedes FA cure periods
state_overrides.ca_unaudited_bkc_balance_sheet: Added to Exhibit Q per California addendum
state_overrides.wa_buy_back_restriction: BKC repurchase without franchisee consent unlawful unless termination for good cause
state_overrides.notes: FDD-level addenda fully surfaced for 9 states. Agreement-level amendments (FA, DA, MTRA, TRA per state) mapped but not read.

highest_impact_pending.name: Arrington v. BK Worldwide (No-Hire Class Action)
highest_impact_pending.claims: Sherman Act Section 1 — no-hire clause in standard FA

highest_impact_pending.name: Plymouth County v. RBI (Carrols Acquisition Fairness)
highest_impact_pending.claims: Breach of fiduciary duty, unjust enrichment in Carrols acquisition

notable_concluded.name: Hapema v. BKE (Switzerland)
notable_concluded.outcome: Court found BKE infringed Swiss Cartel Act via coupon pricing. Settled.

notable_concluded.name: Meals Catalunya v. BKE (Spain)
notable_concluded.outcome: Court found wrongful termination of 3 of 4 locations. EUR 1.5M damages to franchisee.

red_flags.summary: Cover page investment range ($348K-$4.7M) spans all 6 formats without format-level clarification.
Base Fee definition allows future royalty increase above 4.5%.

validation_questions: Reconcile: Cover page investment range ($348K-$4.7M) spans all 6 formats without format-level clarification.
Reconcile: 38-unit gap: Carrols 1,023 vs. reacquisition column 1,061.
Reconcile: Base Fee definition allows future royalty increase above 4.5%.
Confirm Item 19 cohort definition with franchisor.
Confirm current auditor and most recent opinion date.

filing_changes.old_value: $50,000 standard (20-year term). Prorated for shorter terms, minimum $15,000. Fully earned at signing, nonrefundable.
$50,000 standard (20-year term). Prorated for shorter terms, minimum $15,000. Fully earned at signing, nonrefundable.

key_exhibits.notes: Via Item 17 summaries only. 90 pages unsurfaced.

key_exhibits.notes: Headlines extracted. Notes (~80pp) and guarantee text unsurfaced.

key_exhibits.title: Franchise Agreements
key_exhibits.notes: Fully read. 8 critical findings beyond Item 17. See 11_fa_deep_read.md.

key_exhibits.title: Digital App Services Agreement
key_exhibits.notes: Fully read. AS-IS, no SLAs, 6-month liability cap, broad data ownership. See 12_digital_services.md.

key_exhibits.notes: Extracted: 604 entities, top 30 operators, concentration analysis. See 13_franchisee_list.json.

key_exhibits.notes: FDD addenda for 9 states surfaced. Agreement amendments not read.
